import Mathlib

noncomputable structure ValidScopes (id : Type) (req : Type) [BEq id] [BEq req] [DecidableEq id] [DecidableEq req] (validScopes : List (List id)) (numThreads : Nat) (numReqs : Nat) : Type :=
  id → req → id → Prop

def opReqId? : Option (Request) → Option (RequestId) := Option.map λ r => r.id

def valConsistent (vals :  Array (Option (Request))) : Bool :=
  let valOpIds := vals.map opReqId?
  let valConsistent := λ (i : Nat) (v : Option (Request)) => match v with
    | none => true
    | some val => val == i
  let consistentVals := valOpIds.mapIdx valConsistent
  consistentVals.foldl (. ∧ .) true

structure RequestArray where
  val : Array (Option (Request))
  coherent : valConsistent val = true
